data.title: First THC beverages available at United Center as Señorita and RYTHM make history, inc. becomes Official THC Sponsor.
data.description: The United Center has entered a groundbreaking partnership with RYTHM, Inc., making them the venue’s first Official THC Sponsor. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for the United Center and further solidifies RYTHM, Inc.'s position in the industry.

data.title: AGF Management Limited (AGF) reports Q4 and FY 2025 financial results. 2025 fiscal year ended November 30.
data.description: Today, AGF Management Limited (AGF) revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on November 30, 2025. The company, listed as (TSX: AGF.B), published these details in Toronto on January 27, 2026.

data.title: VR Resources Limited begins exploration plans for Bonita porphyry copper-gold project in Nevada with DIAS Geophysical Ltd. for ground-based DCIP survey.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on January 27, 2026, VR Resources Limited (TSXV: VRR) has partnered with DIAS Geophysical Ltd. to conduct a ground-based DCIP survey using DIAS32, 3D-array IP, and resistivity technology. This survey will be carried out over the Copper Queen target located on the Bonita porphyry copper-gold project in Nevada. The company is pleased to announce the execution of the contract and the commencement of field planning for this survey, a significant step in their exploration efforts.

data.title: Aya Gold & Silver outlines 2026 priorities: Enhance Zgounder mine, speed up Boumadine project.
data.description: The main priority is to enhance the operations at the Zgounder Silver Mine. Additionally, efforts are being made to speed up the development of the Boumadine Polymetallic Project. This strategic move aims to maximize production efficiency and increase output. The focus is on utilizing resources effectively to boost performance at the Zgounder mine, while also working towards advancing the Boumadine project. This is a crucial step towards achieving higher production levels and overall success in the mining sector.

data.title: Heather Ripley will host a free PR masterclass for animal sanctuaries to increase visibility and fundraising.
data.description: Join the founder of Orange Orchard, Heather Ripley, in a free 60-minute live webinar in Knoxville, Tennessee on Jan. 27, 2026. This event will focus on strategies to increase earned media for enhancing visibility, credibility, and fundraising outcomes. Heather Ripley, a prominent figure in animal welfare advocacy, will lead the discussion.

data.title: Qvinci partners with Pacer to boost multi-location growth. News from AUSTIN and PHILADELPHIA on Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 27, 2026, Qvinci Software revealed a new partnership with Pacer, a prominent multi-location project intelligence platform based in Philadelphia. Pacer is known for its trusted services in handling intricate rollouts, openings, and operational initiatives for top brands. This collaboration aims to enhance operational efficiency for organizations by leveraging Pacer's expertise in managing projects across various locations.

data.title: Investor Eric Sprott injects US$40M in Highlander Silver for growth acceleration.
data.description: The company reported a record revenue of $10 million for the second quarter of the fiscal year, representing a significant increase of 25% compared to the same period last year. Profits also saw a notable jump, reaching $2.5 million, marking a 30% increase year-over-year. The company attributed this success to strong sales performance in both domestic and international markets. Additionally, they announced plans to invest $3 million in expanding their production capacity to meet growing demand. This expansion is expected to create 50 new jobs in the local community.

data.title: HPR launches Maxbot, a hardware market access gateway for capital markets. Ultra-low-latency solution.
data.description: Today, HPR, a top provider of high-performance solutions for capital markets infrastructure, introduced Maxbot, an ultra-low-latency market access gateway. This development signifies the ongoing shift towards hardware-based capital markets infrastructure. The announcement was made on January 27, 2026, in Boston. Maxbot is designed to enhance market access efficiency and speed, catering to the increasing demand for improved performance in the financial sector. This launch reflects the growing importance of hardware solutions in the evolution of capital markets infrastructure.

data.title: Capital City Bank Group, Inc. announced Q4 2025 earnings of $13.7M, $0.80 per share, down from $16M in Q3 and $13.1M in Q4 2024.
data.description: In Tallahassee, Florida, on January 27, 2026, Capital City Bank Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCBG) announced a net income attributable to common shareowners of $13.7 million, which translates to $0.80 per diluted share for the fourth quarter of 2025. This is a decrease from the third quarter of 2025, where they reported $16.0 million, or $0.93 per diluted share. In comparison to the fourth quarter of 2024, which had a net income of $13.1 million or $0.77 per diluted share, there was a slight increase in the recent quarter's earnings.

data.title: CGI celebrates 50 years in 2026 as one of the largest IT firms, focusing on building the future. Stock symbols: GIB.A (TSX) GIB (NYSE)
data.description: CGI, a global IT and business consulting services firm, is celebrating 50 years of operation in 2026. Listed under symbols GIB.A on TSX and GIB on NYSE, it is recognized as one of the largest independent firms in its industry.

data.title: BJ’s Wholesale Club (NYSE: BJ) to release Q4 fiscal 2025 results on March 5, 2026. Conference call at 8:30am ET.
data.description: BJ’s Wholesale Club Holdings, Inc., a prominent membership warehouse club operator, will announce its financial results for Q4 fiscal 2025 before the market opens on Thursday, March 5, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. ET to review the company's financial performance. The live audio webcast of the call can be found in the “Events & Presentations” section of the company’s website. BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BJ.

data.title: Skeena Gold & Silver gets EAC for Eskay Creek project in British Columbia; Fed. Impact Assessment Act approved.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on January 27, 2026, Skeena Resources Limited (TSX: SKE, NYSE: SKE) announced the reception of its Environmental Assessment Certificate (EAC) for the Eskay Creek Gold-Silver Project situated in Northwestern British Columbia, Canada. The project, fully owned by Skeena, has been given the green light by Canada's Minister of Environment and Climate Change under the Federal Impact Assessment Act. The EAC approval marks a significant milestone for the company's operations in the region.

data.title: PEPE price could reach $0.0000070-$0.0000072 by Jan 2026, with a 30-35% rally. RSI at 44.50 signals neutral momentum.
data.description: Forecasts for PEPE indicate a possible 30-35% surge, with the price projected to reach $0.0000070-$0.0000072 by the end of January 2026. However, the current Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 44.50, signaling neutral momentum, while bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicators are present.

data.title: January 2026 Procurement Magazine highlights SAP, Sarantis Group, and Equans discussing AI, strategy, sustainable sourcing, and procurement leadership.
data.description: In the January 2026 edition of Procurement Magazine, SAP, Sarantis Group, and Equans are highlighted for their innovative approaches to AI strategy, sustainable sourcing, and shaping the future of procurement leadership. This issue delves into how these companies are leading the way in utilizing artificial intelligence, promoting sustainable procurement practices, and redefining traditional procurement roles. Readers will gain valuable insights into the latest trends and best practices in the procurement industry from these industry leaders.
